comments.author: @GlobalRealLifeDocumentary
comments.text: Singapore is proof that a country doesn't need to be big to become a global powerhouse. 🇸🇬 Clean streets, world-class infrastructure, and one of the strongest economies in Asia—but here's my question: if you could instantly adopt ONE thing from Singapore in your own country, what would it be and why?

replies.author: @TheGlobalTruth04
replies.text: I'd choose Singapore's cleanliness and strong sense of civic responsibility. When people and public systems work together to keep shared spaces clean and well-organized, it improves quality of life for everyone.
